ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Write something beautiful... Use [[links]] to jump to notes, #tags to categorize, and **bold** or *italic* formatting.
ast.target: 写下一些美好的内容... 使用 [[链接]] 跳转到笔记，#标签 进行分类，以及 **粗体** 或 *斜体* 格式。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Right-click any folder or file in the explorer and click
ast.target: 在资源管理器中右键点击任何文件夹或文件，然后点击

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: to assign specific unique colors or icons!
ast.target: 来分配特定的唯一颜色或图标！

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Define rules to automatically assign icons based on folder/file names.
ast.target: 定义规则以根据文件夹/文件名自动分配图标。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 彩色文件夹：手动导入失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to save settings from color picker:
ast.target: 从颜色选择器保存设置失败：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 渲染更新日志 Markdown 失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Colorful Folders: Failed to sync dividers for container
ast.target: 彩色文件夹：为容器同步分隔线失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Colorful Folders: Failed to parse custom icon rule
ast.target: 彩色文件夹：解析自定义图标规则失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Colorful folders: failed to fetch collective changelog from GitHub
ast.target: 彩色文件夹：从 GitHub 获取集体更新日志失败

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Force nested folders to inherit this style.
ast.target: 强制嵌套文件夹继承此样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Force files inside this folder to inherit this style.
ast.target: 强制此文件夹内的文件继承此样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The display name for this section.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose an icon or emoji for this section divider.
ast.target: 为此部分分隔线选择一个图标或表情符号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Force the capsule shape or hide it for this divider.
ast.target: 强制胶囊形状或为此分隔线隐藏它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Enter an rgba color. Leave empty to inherit folder color.
ast.target: 可选。输入一个 rgba 颜色。留空以继承文件夹颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a frosted-glass background for the pill.
ast.target: 为药丸使用磨砂玻璃背景。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A premium popover with Markdown support (links, tags, etc).
ast.target: 支持 Markdown（链接、标签等）的高级弹出窗口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allows colorful folders to safely style the icons and text of notebook navigator items.
ast.target: 允许彩色文件夹安全地设置笔记本导航器项目的图标和文本样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Injects the faint background block and left border to file cards. Disable this to keep the cards strictly native.
ast.target: 为文件卡片注入微弱的背景块和左边框。禁用此项以保持卡片完全原生。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes solid backgrounds from notebook navigator items, showing only the left accent border.
ast.target: 移除笔记本导航器项目的纯色背景，仅显示左侧强调边框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a URL to a JSON icon pack { 'id': '<svg...>' }
ast.target: 输入一个 JSON 图标包的 URL { 'id': '<svg...>' }

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ensures all icons in your library are properly loaded into Obsidian.
ast.target: 确保您库中的所有图标都已正确加载到 Obsidian 中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Permanently deletes all imported icon packs.
ast.target: 永久删除所有已导入的图标包。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a curated color scheme for your vault. Choose "custom" to enter your own hex codes below.
ast.target: 为您的仓库选择一个精选配色方案。选择“自定义”以在下方输入您自己的十六进制颜色代码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的十六进制颜色列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folder names to ignore. Note: folder names are case-insensitive.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的要忽略的文件夹名称列表。注意：文件夹名称不区分大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cycle assigns colors sequentially. Monochromatic uses depth-based shading. Heatmap colors folders based on the most recently modified file inside.
ast.target: 循环模式按顺序分配颜色。单色模式使用基于深度的阴影。热图模式根据文件夹内最近修改的文件为其着色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a universal background color for all folders/files that do not have a custom style. Leave empty for theme-default (transparent).
ast.target: 为所有没有自定义样式的文件夹/文件设置一个通用背景色。留空则使用主题默认值（透明）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shift the starting color index for the rainbow cycle.
ast.target: 为彩虹循环设置起始颜色索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Solid uses vivid backgrounds for root folders. Translucent provides a softer, glowing look.
ast.target: 实体模式为根文件夹使用鲜明的背景。半透明模式提供更柔和、发光的外观。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds an iOS-style backdrop blur to folder backgrounds. Best with semi-translucent themes.
ast.target: 为文件夹背景添加 iOS 风格的背景模糊效果。最适合搭配半透明主题使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this to override the default luminous selection colors with your own.
ast.target: 启用此选项以用您自己的颜色覆盖默认的发光选中颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The background color for the currently selected file.
ast.target: 当前选中文件的背景颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text color for the currently selected file.
ast.target: 当前选中文件的文本颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically apply background tints to files to match their parent folder.
ast.target: 自动为文件应用背景色调，以匹配其父文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Multiplies the size of all folder and file icons (default 1.0). Range: 0.5 to 2.5.
ast.target: 缩放所有文件夹和文件图标的大小（默认 1.0）。范围：0.5 到 2.5。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Logs icon matching logic to the developer console. Useful if auto-icons are not appearing as expected.
ast.target: 将图标匹配逻辑记录到开发者控制台。如果自动图标未按预期显示，此功能很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Assigns different icons to items within the same category for better visual distinction.
ast.target: 为同一类别内的项目分配不同的图标，以获得更好的视觉区分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize matching logic with simple patterns.
ast.target: 使用简单的模式自定义匹配逻辑。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, dividers use the rounded "pill" background and border. When disabled, only text and lines are shown.
ast.target: 启用时，分隔线使用圆润的“胶囊”背景和边框。禁用时，仅显示文本和线条。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Set a universal background color for all pills (rgba supported). Leave empty to inherit folder colors automatically.
ast.target: 可选。为所有胶囊设置一个通用背景色（支持 rgba）。留空则自动继承文件夹颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adjust the empty space above and below dividers.
ast.target: 调整分隔线上方和下方的空白空间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adjust horizontal space between the left divider line and the central label.
ast.target: 调整左侧分隔线与中央标签之间的水平空间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adjust horizontal space between the right divider line and the central label.
ast.target: 调整右侧分隔线与中央标签之间的水平空间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adjust the thickness of vertical indentation lines and active borders.
ast.target: 调整垂直缩进线和活动边框的粗细。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Displays recursive folder and file counts next to folder names.
ast.target: 在文件夹名称旁显示递归的文件夹和文件计数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies a vivid rainbow-text horizontal gradient to all top-level folders.
ast.target: 为所有顶级文件夹应用生动的彩虹文本水平渐变。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keeps the root text effect but removes the solid/translucent background box.
ast.target: 保留根文本效果，但移除实体/半透明的背景框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Transparency of top-level folders in file explorer.
ast.target: 文件资源管理器中顶级文件夹的透明度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 嵌套子文件夹的透明度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls how highly tinted the background content space becomes when you open a directory.
ast.target: 控制当您打开一个目录时，背景内容空间的着色程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Global transparency for all auto-colored files (default 10%).
ast.target: 所有自动着色文件的全局透明度（默认 10%）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reveal hidden items with low opacity and blur. Note: items are still clickable in this mode.
ast.target: 以低透明度和模糊效果显示隐藏项目。注意：在此模式下项目仍可点击。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a password to lock the hidden items list and ghost mode. Leave empty to disable.
ast.target: 设置密码以锁定隐藏项目列表和幽灵模式。留空则禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a quick-toggle icon to the Obsidian sidebar.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 侧边栏添加一个快速切换图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scans your configuration and removes style entries for folders or files that no longer exist in your vault.
ast.target: 扫描您的配置，并移除仓库中已不存在的文件夹或文件的样式条目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download a backup of your colorful folder and file styles (excludes dividers).
ast.target: 下载您的彩色文件夹和文件样式的备份（不包括分隔线）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download a backup of your section dividers only.
ast.target: 仅下载您的分隔线备份。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore folder styles or dividers from a previous backup file. This will merge with your current settings.
ast.target: 从之前的备份文件恢复文件夹样式或分隔线。这将与您当前的设置合并。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Danger: this will permanently remove all custom colors, icons, and individual folder styles. Presets are also cleared.
ast.target: 警告：这将永久移除所有自定义颜色、图标和单个文件夹样式。预设也将被清除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Critical: this will reset every setting in the plugin to its original default state, including opacities, toggles, and all custom data.
ast.target: 严重警告：这将把插件中的每个设置重置为原始默认状态，包括透明度、开关和所有自定义数据。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用笔记本导航器支持

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用自定义活动文件颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 打开的文件夹背景色调 (%)

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Tailor your vault's interface with premium palettes and refined structural aesthetics.
ast.target: 使用高级调色板和精致的结构美学，定制您的保险库界面。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Seamlessly connect with external extensions and optimize your workflow.
ast.target: 无缝连接外部扩展，优化您的工作流程。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Command a vast library of symbols with intelligent automation rules.
ast.target: 通过智能自动化规则，掌控庞大的符号库。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Maintain peak performance and manage your styling engine's core.
ast.target: 保持最佳性能，管理样式引擎的核心。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: 💡 Tip: You can also use the 'Toggle stealth mode' command (e.g., Ctrl+Shift+Q). This can be customized in Obsidian's hotkey settings.
ast.target: 💡 提示：您也可以使用“切换隐身模式”命令（例如 Ctrl+Shift+Q）。这可以在 Obsidian 的快捷键设置中自定义。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 打开可视化颜色选择器

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 彩色文件夹：预览更新失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: To reset your password, perform a 'Factory reset' in the plugin settings or manually clear the password in your data.json file.
ast.target: 要重置密码，请在插件设置中执行“恢复出厂设置”，或手动清除 data.json 文件中的密码。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please provide a valid ID and SVG code.
ast.target: 请提供有效的 ID 和 SVG 代码。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 所有自定义图标已重新注册。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 文件夹样式备份恢复成功！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Styles and presets have been reset.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: All settings have been restored to defaults.
ast.target: 所有设置已恢复为默认值。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Import failed. See console for details.
ast.target: 导入失败。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No stale style entries found. Your configuration is clean!
ast.target: 未发现过时的样式条目。您的配置很干净！

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 超过 4000+ 精心设计的图标。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 高质量的网页友好图标。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 来自 FA 的官方线条图标。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 用于 RPG 笔记的奇幻图标。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 用于热门服务的品牌图标。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open color picker for current file
ast.target: 为当前文件打开颜色选择器

ast.name: name
ast.target: 为当前文件添加/编辑分隔线

ast.name: name
ast.target: 移除当前文件的分隔线

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add context, links, or tags that appear when you hover over this divider.
ast.target: 添加上下文、链接或标签，当您将鼠标悬停在此分隔线上时显示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No message set. Hover popover will be hidden.
ast.target: 未设置消息。悬停弹出窗口将被隐藏。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please enter your vault password to continue.
ast.target: 请输入您的保险库密码以继续。

ast.name: text
ast.source: 💡 Tip: To change icons in notebook navigator, simply use the colorful folders menu in the standard explorer. All changes are automatically synchronized.
ast.target: 💡 提示：要更改笔记本导航器中的图标，只需使用标准资源管理器中的彩色文件夹菜单。所有更改都会自动同步。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add individual SVG icons or import bulk packs from the internet. All custom icons added here will appear in the icon selection grid when styling a folder or file.
ast.target: 添加单个SVG图标或从互联网批量导入图标包。此处添加的所有自定义图标在为文件夹或文件设置样式时都会出现在图标选择网格中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pro tip: custom ids should be unique. Avoid starting them with 'lucide-' unless you intend to override a built-in Obsidian icon.
ast.target: 专业提示：自定义ID应唯一。除非您打算覆盖内置的Obsidian图标，否则避免以'lucide-'开头。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can manually paste the JSON content of an icon pack below to import it.
ast.target: 您可以手动在下方粘贴图标包的JSON内容以进行导入。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter your password above to manage hidden folders.
ast.target: 请在上方输入您的密码以管理隐藏文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 彩色文件夹的最新动态
